name: Rockwell Automation FactoryTalk API
what_it_does: Rockwell Automation FactoryTalk REST APIs for industrial automation and Connected Enterprise platform. Enables AI agents to manage FactoryTalk Historian real-time and historical process data retrieval for manufacturing analytics, handle Allen-Bradley PLC tag data access for production monitoring, access FactoryTalk Optix and View HMI data for operational visualization, retrieve production order and MES data from FactoryTalk ProductionCentre, manage equipment and asset performance analytics from FactoryTalk Analytics, handle alarm and event data from FactoryTalk Alarms & Events for production operations, access FactoryTalk IntelliHub IoT connectivity data for edge-to-cloud integration, retrieve OEE and downtime data for manufacturing performance management, manage workforce and operator management data, and integrate manufacturing data with SAP, Oracle, and enterprise systems via FactoryTalk DataMosaix.
use_cases: Reading historian process data from manufacturing analytics agents
Monitoring PLC tag values from production monitoring agents
Analyzing OEE metrics from manufacturing optimization agents
Integrating MES data with ERP from production agents
not_for: Non-Allen-Bradley PLC environments without Rockwell ecosystem investment
Commercial building automation without industrial manufacturing focus
Cloud-native IoT without Rockwell Connected Enterprise on-premise footprint
best_when: A manufacturer using Allen-Bradley PLCs and FactoryTalk infrastructure wants AI agents to automate process data retrieval, OEE analytics, production order integration, and IT/OT data bridging.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: FactoryTalk connects to Allen-Bradley PLCs controlling industrial equipment — automated PLC output bit write without safety interlock validation and process engineer authorization causes equipment damage and safety incidents. Automated alarm acknowledgment violates ISA-18.2 alarm management standards. Industrial automation changes require MOC procedures.

auth.notes: FactoryTalk uses OAuth 2.0 via FactoryTalk Hub identity platform. Developer portal at developer.rockwellautomation.com. Webhooks for production events. REST API with JSON. Cloud (FactoryTalk Hub) and on-premise deployment. Milwaukee, Wisconsin HQ. Public (ROK NYSE). Rockwell-Aspentech partnership for industrial AI.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription per product
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per FactoryTalk product (Historian, Analytics, MES, etc.)
pricing.notes: Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Founded 1903. Public (ROK NYSE). $9B+ annual revenue. Industrial automation and information market leader. Allen-Bradley PLC brand dominant in North America. Connected Enterprise strategy for IT/OT convergence. Partnership with PTC (minority stake). Competes with Siemens and Emerson for industrial automation.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; product-specific limits

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: Allen-Bradley PLC automation requires safety interlock validation; automated tag writes without process engineer approval cause industrial safety incidents
FactoryTalk product suite — FactoryTalk includes Historian, View, Analytics, Optix, and MES; each has separate API endpoints and auth; verify which product has your data
On-premise vs. cloud — most FactoryTalk Historian deployments are on-premise; FactoryTalk DataMosaix cloud connector bridges to cloud; understand architecture before API integration
Allen-Bradley PLC data access — direct PLC tag access requires FactoryTalk Linx or EtherNet/IP; REST API provides access to historian data, not live PLC registers directly
Alarm management ISA-18.2 — automated alarm response in FactoryTalk must preserve operator acknowledgment; ISA-18.2 compliance requires human-in-the-loop for safety alarms
Connected Enterprise licensing — Rockwell Connected Enterprise requires FactoryTalk Hub cloud subscription for full REST API access; on-premise products have different access patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: Industrial automation and MES. SOC2, IEC62443, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. PLC, historian, and production data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Industrial automation. SOC2, IEC62443, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. PLC and manufacturing data.
